name: Koopa Troopa
description:
After 5 long years of serving King Bowser in the Royal Koopa Army, now aged 23, this Koopa had had enough and silently quit, sneaking away in the dark hours of the night. 

While he was leaving some friends of his behind, other Koopas he had considered brothers to him, he knew deep down that he was on the wrong side of the fight between two kingdoms.

Over the next few weeks he travelled to the Mushroom Kingdom, he also knew that due to the high tensions between the two kingdoms he would likely not be very well accepted by the Toads, Yoshis and such. For him it didn’t matter though, he wanted to be happy, and that would never happen in Bowser’s Royal Army. 

This Koopa Troopa would do anything necessary to protect peace, even if it meant standing up to King Bowser himself despite being super afraid. 

He had been involved directly in quite a few fights against the Mario Bros, almost destroying them quite a few times so he also wanted to come apologise directly, if he managed to find the chance to. And also apologise to Princess Peach and try to let it be known that not all Koopas are bad. 

Due to being in the army for 5 years be was a pretty strong guy and would likely be able to hold his own in a fight. Upon seeing them for himself he would obtain a fascination in the world of sports, putting his energy towards something fun and entertaining rather than evil.

Maybe one day if it becomes known that this Koopa was allowed in the mushroom kingdom peacefully and gained fame around the kingdom, perhaps it would inspire other Koopas to leave Bowser’s army for better lives.
creator: Charmander0004
